de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class KeYFileForTests

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.KeYFile
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.KeYFileForTests
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EnvInput

    public class KeYFileForTests
extends KeYFile
    Used for TESTS ONLY as we allow there to declare program variables global in rule files.

      • KeYFileForTests

        public KeYFileForTests(String name,

    • Method Detail

      • read

        public ImmutableSet<PositionedString> read()
                                    throws ProofInputException
        reads the whole .key file and modifies the initial configuration assigned to this object according to the given modification strategy. Throws an exception if no initial configuration has been set yet.
        Specified by:
        read in interface EnvInput
        Overrides:
        read in class KeYFile
        Returns:
        The found warnings or an empty ImmutableSet if no warnings occurred.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • variables

        public Namespace variables()
